name: Xingye Alloy Materials Group Limited
summary: Xingye Alloy Materials Group Limited manufactures, sells, and trades in high precision copper plates and strips in Mainland China, Thailand, Taiwan, and internationally. It operates through Copper Products and Online Games segments. The company's products include high precision tin-phosphor bronze strips, copper tin zinc alloys, brass strips, zinc copper strips, multicomponent copper alloys, copper alloy strips, copper alloys, and red copper strips. It also trades in raw materials; develops, publishes, and operates online games and provides related services; and provides processing and property services. The company's products are used in electronic equipment, automobile, and electric power and household appliances. It also exports its products to Southeast Asia, India, and other countries. The company was formerly known as Huan Yue Interactive Holdings Limited and changed its name to Xingye Alloy Materials Group Limited in July 2020. Xingye Alloy Materials Group Limited was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
